title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd!
